name: Jerry Orbach
abstract: Jerome Bernard Orbach (October 20, 1935 – December 28, 2004) was an American actor and singer described as "one of the last  bona fide leading men of the Broadway musical". Orbach's career began on the New York stage, both on and off-Broadway.

concerts.label: Give My Regards to Broadway – A Salute to 125 Years of Musical Theater

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Shiner
about_quotes.evidence: I did the original “Three Penny Opera” down in the Villages with Lottie Lenya and Bea Arthur... Jerry Orbach was in the show... We all did “Three Penny Opera” for scale.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Shiner interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 11, 1998
